objective: Integrate live difficulty selection and route receipts into KB work
prefetch: Read the slice plan and listed source files before broader search
constraints: Missing router degrades to current model
Generic spawn cannot prove model identity
acceptance_criteria: Fallback preserves proof and unrelated ready work
Pre-existing correct work is not redone
model_tier_reason: Workflow integration is bounded by the completed deterministic router contract
escalation_triggers: Host adapter capability contradicts the skill contract
Routing would weaken an existing KB gate
Skill changes require new public behavior beyond requirements
